Description:
Objective - Establish secure access for new and returning users.
Context - The project needs a clear entry path before protected features are usable.
Scope - Includes signup, login, session persistence, and protected route access.
Success criteria - Users can create accounts, sign in, and access protected screens.
Risks and dependencies - Depends on backend auth API and token storage decisions.
Other information - Sample row for duplicate checker validation.

Summary: User can sign in with email and password
Description:
Objective - Implement email/password login for registered users.
Context - Login is the primary entry point for authenticated product use.
Scope - Includes form validation, API call, token handling, and error display.
Success criteria - Valid credentials create a session; invalid credentials show a clear error.
Risks and dependencies - Depends on POST /api/auth/login contract.
Other information - Sample Story row.

Summary: Create login form validation for email and password fields
Description:
Objective - Add client-side validation to the login form.
Success criteria - Missing email, invalid email, and missing password block submission with inline errors.
Notes - Keep validation messages consistent with shared form patterns.
